abilities.name: Earthbind
abilities.description: Tosses a net at the target point, rooting down all enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Poof
abilities.description: A Meepo can teleport to another Meepo or itself after its cast point, dealing damage in both the departure and arrival locations.

abilities.name: Ransack
abilities.description: Steals health from the attacked enemy target per strike and heals all other Meepos for a fixed amount.

abilities.name: Dig
abilities.description: Dispels Meepo, becomes invulnerable and hidden shortly, while restoring its health.

abilities.name: MegaMeepo
abilities.description: The Prime mounts all other lesser Meepos within the radius around him on top of his shoulders.While in this form, the other lesser Meepos share their attributes with the Prime.

abilities.name: MegaMeepo Fling
abilities.description: MegaMeepo flings the topmost Meepo towards a target, dealing damage and slowing their movement speed.

abilities.name: Divided We Stand
abilities.description: Meepo Summons another Meepo, which levels up and shares items and experience with the main Meepo. Ability cooldowns are independent, but items share cooldowns between Meepos, except Teleport Scrolls.
